spoilers.title: #ONEPIECE1179 Killingham: The Great One?! Sommers: No way, he came here personally?! Giant: On the peak of the castle... there's someone there!! ------------------------------ IMU'S INTRODUCTION BOX #
spoilers.text: #ONEPIECE1179 Killingham: The Great One?! Sommers: No way, he came here personally?! Giant: On the peak of the castle... there's someone there!! ------------------------------ IMU'S INTRODUCTION BOX #1: "WORLD GOVERNMENT" CREATOR (ONE OF THE FIRST TWENTY) ABILITY: DEVIL FRUIT IMU'S INTRODUCTION BOX #2: "KING OF THE WORLD" ST. NERONA IMU The Will of Marco (マルコの意志) (@TheWillOfMarco) ⚠️ #ONEPIECE1179 SPOILER ⚠️ FINAL SCENES OF THE CHAPTER: (Luffy, Loki and Ragnir arrives at the Walrus School.) Loki: Why is the school frozen?! Lilith: Not quite!! Its thermal energy has been taken!! (The three begin eating the lunch provisions in the school. Its all frozen.) Loki: No luck, huh? The school lunches are frozen too—they taste awful!! Luffy: Mood... (Food...) I need to give some to Ushopp and the othersh too... Loki: You need to turn back to normal first!! Luffy: Loki... the one you froze earlier... is she dead? Loki: That's flash-freezing. She won’t die, but only this guy can melt that ice. *(pointing at Ragnir)* She’s not going anywhere, so don't worry. Ragnir: Kuririri!! (Cut to Nami and Zeus. Both of them sense something.) Zeus: Huh!!? Nami: Hmm? *DON!* *A huge pillar of black smoke/cloud/lightning descends from the sky. Same as that time when the Five Elders arrived at Egghead.* Nami: KYAAAHH!!! Giant: What is that?! Giant: That's just black smoke, isn't it?! Giants: WAAHHH!!! KYAAHHH!!! Giant: Huh?! Giant: Look at the sky! (An enormous pentagram magic circle is seen in the sky above Aurust Castle) Giant: A magic circle?! Nami: Everyone, come and look! Franky: What’s with these echoing trees?! Sanji: Nami-san! I’m right by your side! ❤️ (A giant pentagram magic circle appears in the sky—the Abyss—black pillars of smoke, clouds, and lightning descend from each point of the pentagram. Trees and houses begin to come alive with evil looks on their faces and start to sing.) SINGING SFX: ZUMU 🎵 ZUMU 🎵 DORORON 🎵 DORORON 🎵 GYAOH 🎵 UWOHO 🎵 Giant: Wah! The houses! Giant: Why?! Is this a dream?! DORORORO 🎵 DORORON 🎵 GEHHO 🎵 DON 🎵 DON 🎵 Giant: Even the trees of the forest…?! Giant: Is this somebody’s ability again?! DADADAN 🎵 DADADAN 🎵 DORORORORORORORO 🎵 DON! (A giant black pillar of smoke/clouds/lightning erupts from the center of the pentagram magic circle and strikes Aurust Castle. A massive wave of Conqueror’s Haki bursts across all of Elbaph. The giant kids are fainting. We see Colon and Olav faint.) ?!! (Chopper is clinging to Zoro’s head LOL) Zoro: Conqueror’s Haki?! Loki: It’s coming from the castle?! Hey, this Haki… it was from earlier…!! (Inside Aurust Castle's Throne Room) (Imu appears at the same magic circle where Shamrock and Gunko arrived from. Imu's silhouette is still the slender figure with a three-pointed crown on his head.) Imu: *COUGH!* HUFF... HUFF... *COUGH!* *SPLAT* (Imu is coughing a lot of blood. We can see some of the coughed blood pooling on the ground.) Imu: HUFF... HUFF... HUFF... UGGHHH... AAHHHHH...!!! (We can see Imu's silhouette start to shift; a silhouette of black wings can be seen sprouting from his back.) (The Throne Room explodes.) *BOOM!* ?!! Jarul: WHO'S THAT?! (Imu gets to the topmost tower of Aurust Castle. I'm not sure if this is his true appearance or some kind of Devil Fruit ability transformation, because his silhouette form is completely different to his form seen in these final pages. See @pewpiece's description of Imu.) Killingham: The Great One?! Sommers: No way, he came here personally?! Giant: On the peak of the castle... there's someone there!! ------------------------------ IMU'S INTRODUCTION BOX #1: "WORLD GOVERNMENT" CREATOR (ONE OF THE FIRST TWENTY) ABILITY: DEVIL FRUIT ---------------------------------- IMU'S INTRODUCTION BOX #2: "KING OF THE WORLD" ST. NERONA IMU [Note: The "St." of Imu is written in Kanji as “聖” (sei), the title given to male Celestial Dragons.] End Note: DESCENT!! BREAK NEXT WEEK — https://nitter.net/TheWillOfMarco/status/2039659110564593830#m

misc.title: [#ONEPIECE1179] ELBAPH has had its ups and downs, but one thing for sure, this arc has the best reveals ever!!! 1. Loki 2. Shamrock 3. The Mural (LORE) 4. Old man Scopper Gaban 5. Xebec NOW WE GOT NER
misc.text: [#ONEPIECE1179] ELBAPH has had its ups and downs, but one thing for sure, this arc has the best reveals ever!!! 1. Loki 2. Shamrock 3. The Mural (LORE) 4. Old man Scopper Gaban 5. Xebec NOW WE GOT NERONA IMU!!!!!

misc.title: Elbaf arc starting with nami waking up to a strange hidden voice and kidnapped to a castle now oda is highlighting Nami noticing something when imu arrives!? What are you cooking oda!? WHAT!? #ONEPIEC

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1179 IMU'S SCENE IN THE CHAPTER BEFORE LEAVING THE HOLY LAND: Garling: Disasters keep piling up... And this all have been happening since "Nika" appeared... Warcury: Is it "coincidence" or "i
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1179 IMU'S SCENE IN THE CHAPTER BEFORE LEAVING THE HOLY LAND: Garling: Disasters keep piling up... And this all have been happening since "Nika" appeared... Warcury: Is it "coincidence" or "inevitability"...!? Ju Peter: But be that as it may... Imu-sama!! You must not leave "Pangea Castle"!! Warcury: In that case, we should send "Admirals" from "Marine Headquarters" to Elbaph... V. Nusjuro: No... just look at the number of incidents occurring right now. Their hands are full. Warcury: Then we shall once again...!! Imu: Warcury—this is no longer a "coincidence." "Arrogance," "Sloth," "Estrangement," "Pride"... cast them all aside this instant!!! Everything is an "inevitability"! (Imu then reminisces about some important events that transpired) (Rocks panel) Rocks: "I'll be coming back..." (Roger panel) Roger: "Try searching for it" (Neptune's family panel) "It seems Neptune had a daughter born." (Shanks panel) "The devil fruit was stolen?!" (Harald panel) "Is there something on Elbaph?!" (Loki's panel) "We've learned who is the captain of the pirates in the mist. It's Loki, Harald's son!" (Whitebeard and Luffy panels) "He was protected by Whitebeard?! Who is he?" "Monkey D. Luffy" (Blackbeard panel) "Who is that?" "Marshall D. Teach." (Cobra panel) Conra: "Nefertari D. Lili" (Imu slashing up the wanted posters of Luffy and Teach panel) Imu: "Joyboy, Davy Jones!!! Are you all still tormenting Mu?!" (Imu looking at Lili's portrait panel) Imu: "I want... Vivi" (Back to present. Imu prepares to use the Abyss to leave the Holy Land and go to Elbaph.) Imu: It had already begun… a long time ago…

misc.title: People are saying it’s fake… but just look at this. This is the leaked provisional poster from MAPPA that’s been going around, and I’m showing it right here. Also, if you look closely at the bottom, i
misc.text: People are saying it’s fake… but just look at this. This is the leaked provisional poster from MAPPA that’s been going around, and I’m showing it right here. Also, if you look closely at the bottom, it kinda looks like it says “March 29”… 👀 I don’t know, judge for yourselves, but this feels off in a real way. 🩸⚔️ Daily Berserk 𒉭 (@daily_berserk) Berserk is finally getting a new anime adaptation by MAPPA 😳🔥 The announcement dropped just 1 hour ago, and fans are already losing their minds. After all these years… Guts is coming back in the way he deserves. 🩸⚔️ Are we ready for this? — https://nitter.net/daily_berserk/status/2039053928663253083#m

Warcury: Is it "coincidence" or "inevitability"...!? Ju Peter: But be that as it may... Imu-sama!! You must not leave "Pangea Castle"!! Warcury: In that case, we should send "Admirals" from "Marine Headquarters" to Elbaph... V. Nusjuro: No... just look at the number of incidents occurring right now. Their hands are full. Warcury: Then we shall once again...!! Imu: Warcury—this is no longer a "coincidence." "Arrogance," "Sloth," "Estrangement," "Pride"... cast them all aside this instant!!! Everything is an "inevitability"! (Imu then reminisces about some important events that transpired) (Rocks panel) Rocks: "I'll be coming back..." (Roger panel) Roger: "Try searching for it" (Neptune's family panel) "It seems Neptune had a daughter born." (Shanks panel) "The devil fruit was stolen?!" (Harald panel) "Is there something on Elbaph?!" (Loki's panel) "We've learned who is the captain of the pirates in the mist. It's Loki, Harald's son!" (Whitebeard and Luffy panels) "He was protected by Whitebeard?! Who is he?" "Monkey D. Luffy" (Blackbeard panel) "Who is that?" "Marshall D. Teach." (Cobra panel) Conra: "Nefertari D. Lili" (Imu slashing up the wanted posters of Luffy and Teach panel) Imu: "Joyboy, Davy Jones!!! Are you all still tormenting Mu?!" (Imu looking at Lili's portrait panel) Imu: "I want... Vivi" (Back to present. Imu prepares to use the Abyss to leave the Holy Land and go to Elbaph.) Imu: It had already begun… a long time ago…
